studies.title: A Study of MR001 in Patients With Locally Recurrent or Metastatic Advanced Triple-Negative Breast Cancer (TNBC)
studies.official_title: A Phase Ib/IIa, Open-Label, Two-Cohort, Dose-Escalation and Dose-Expansion Clinical Study to Evaluate the Safety, Tolerability, Pharmacokinetics, and Preliminary Anti-tumor Activity of MR001 in Patients With Locally Recurrent or Metastatic Advanced Triple-Negative Breast Cancer (TNBC) Who Have Progressed After First-Line or Later-Line Therapy
studies.brief_summary: This Phase Ib/IIa study is evaluating the safety, tolerability, pharmacokinetics, and preliminary efficacy of MR001 in patients with advanced triple-negative breast cancer (TNBC) who have progressed after prior therapy.
studies.detailed_description: This is a dual-cohort, open-label, dose escalation and dose expansion Phase Ib/IIa study to evaluate the safety, tolerability, pharmacokinetics, and preliminary anti-tumor activity of MR001 in patients with locally recurrent or metastatic advanced triple-negative breast cancer (TNBC) who have progressed after first-line or later-line therapy.

_verification.reason: The study is about a bispecific antibody for injection named MR001, which is unrelated to the digital therapeutic MR-001 from Medrhythms Therapy. The sponsor and intervention description do not match the DTx product.

studies.title: First-In-Human Study of Bispecific Antibody MR001 In Subjects With Advanced Solid Tumors
studies.official_title: Clinical Study on Evaluating the Safety and Tolerability of Bispecific Antibody MR001 in Patients With Advanced Solid Tumors.

interventions.name: MR001
interventions.description:
Dose Level 1: 0.5 mg/kg Intravenously (IV) Frequency: administered on Day 1 of each cycle (every 3 weeks), 1 cycle

Dose Level 2: 2 mg/kg Intravenously (IV) Frequency: administered on Day 1 of each cycle (every 3 weeks), 4 cycle

Dose Level 3: 6 mg/kg Intravenously (IV) Frequency: administered on Day 1 of each cycle (every 3 weeks), 4 cycle

Dose Level 4: 10 mg/kg Intravenously (IV) Frequency: administered on Day 1 of each cycle (every 3 weeks), 4 cycle

Dose Level 5: 15 mg/kg Intravenously (IV)

studies.brief_summary: Phase 1 open-label study to evaluate the safety, tolerability and preliminary efficacy of bispecific antibody MR001 and to determine the maximal tolerated dose and designate the recommended phase 2 dose in subjects with locally advanced or metastatic solid cancers.
studies.detailed_description: Phase 1 open-label study to evaluate the safety, tolerability and preliminary efficacy of bispecific antibody MR001 and to determine the maximal tolerated dose and designate the recommended phase 2 dose in subjects with locally advanced or metastatic solid cancers. The study will be conducted in 2 parts: part 1 will involve dose escalation and part 2 will involve expansion of the recommended phase 2 dose.

_verification.reason: The study is about a bispecific antibody named MR001 for treating advanced solid tumors, which is unrelated to the digital therapeutic MR-001 by Medrhythms Therapy for improving walking ability in chronic stroke patients. The intervention description does not match the DTx product.

studies.title: A Study of MR001 Combined With Chemotherapy in Patients With Locally Advanced or Metastatic Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma (PDAC) After First-line Therapy
studies.official_title: An Open-label, Dose-escalation and Dose-expansion Phase Ib/IIa Study to Evaluate the Safety, Tolerability, Pharmacokinetics, and Preliminary Efficacy of MR001 in Combination With Standard Chemotherapy Regimens in Patients With Locally Advanced or Metastatic Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma (PDAC) Who Have Progressed After First-line Therapy
studies.brief_summary: This Phase Ib/IIa study is evaluating the safety, tolerability, pharmacokinetics, and preliminary efficacy of MR001 Combined with Chemotherapy in patients with locally advanced or metastatic pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC) who have progressed after first-line therapy.
studies.detailed_description: This is an open-label, dose-escalation and dose-expansion Phase Ib/IIa study to evaluate the safety, tolerability, pharmacokinetics, and preliminary efficacy of MR001 in combination with standard chemotherapy regimens in patients with locally advanced or metastatic pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC) who have progressed after first-line therapy.

_verification.reason: The study mentions 'MR001,' but it is clearly a different product used as an intravenous infusion in the context of pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC). This does not match the description of the digital therapeutic MR-001 from Medrhythms Therapy, which is used for improving walking ability in chronic stroke patients using sensors and music. Additionally, the sponsor is not Medrhythms Therapy.
